sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35080" key="e)naxw=s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνᾰχῶς</orth>, <sense id="n35080.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in nine ways</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4017.tlg001:171:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Syrian.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">171.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
